FX.title: [USD/JPY] DOWN: Japan FX Intervention Warning Drives Bearish Fundamental Shift
tldr_points: Japan FX officials issue final warning ahead of potential intervention to strengthen JPY, pressuring USD/JPY lower
Eurozone April preliminary CPI prints above consensus, but ECB policy constraints limit cross-asset spillover
Technical structure shows key support levels exposed to intervention-driven downside breaks
FX.excerpt: Bearish USD/JPY thesis driven by Japan’s pre-intervention FX warning, offsetting mixed Eurozone macro prints.
FX.comment: Japan’s pre-intervention FX warning introduces asymmetric downside risk, overriding rate and technical drivers

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Technical Support Emerges as Fed Policy Clarity Looms
tldr_points: Fed chair nominee Warsh signals potential policy continuity, reducing tail risk
Tech earnings remain mixed with Microsoft cloud strength overshadowed by broader concerns
Oil spike adds inflationary pressure but market shows resilience at key support levels
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 poised for bounce as technical support aligns with Fed policy clarity
STOCKS.comment: Technical support at MA20 aligns with reduced Fed policy uncertainty

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Stablecoin Adoption Outpaces Regulatory Pressure Despite ETF Flows
tldr_points: South Korea's regulatory actions offset by increasing institutional adoption
Stablecoin real-world applications driving utility beyond speculative trading
ETF flows remain positive despite selective profit-taking
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC shows resilience as stablecoin adoption accelerates despite regulatory headwinds.
CRYPTO.comment: Accumulation toward support justified by stablecoin adoption and institutional flows
